cad_status: not retrieved (rejected before CAD stage — see contradiction)
known_contradictions: Part is specified 'For Rail Height: Single 20mm, Double and Quad 40mm'. This is a 20-mm-series profile (its 40mm reading is the DOUBLE/QUAD stacked height of two 20mm modules, not a 40x40mm single-module rail). The target extrusion 6575N203 is a single 40x40mm four-slot rail with an 8mm-wide slot. 20mm-series T-slot extrusions standardly use a 6mm slot, not 8mm. This nut was the weaker of the two warm-start candidates and is contradicted on slot-series grounds, not confirmed compatible with 6575N203.
